scripts.dashboard:build: npm run protocol:build && npm --workspace @ecodrive/dashboard run build
scripts.simulator:build: npm run protocol:build && npm --workspace @ecodrive/simulator run build
scripts.relay:dev: npm run protocol:build && npm --workspace @ecodrive/relay run dev
scripts.relay:deploy: npm run protocol:build && npm --workspace @ecodrive/relay run deploy
scripts.relay:typecheck: npm run protocol:build && npm --workspace @ecodrive/relay run typecheck
scripts.bridge:cloud: npm run protocol:build && npm --workspace @ecodrive/server run bridge:cloud
